sources.title: Solving the gallery picture switch puzzle (Resident Evil) | Evil Resource
Resident Evil: Director's Cut – Guide and Walkthrough (GameFAQs FAQ/32075)

reliable_detection.behavior: one-hot last-accepted correct step; wrong Yes clears to 0; examine/YesNo without Yes leaves 0

noise_do_not_use.0x800C3009: bit1 sets on ANY Yes including wrong/out-of-order

reliable_detection.identity_of_painting: nearest RDT message AOT by player (x,z); dual-write pose mirrors 0x800C5190/5194 for teleports
reliable_detection.yes_confirm_ux: open Cross → advance to 'Will you push it? Yes/No' → Cross confirms default Yes; MESSAGE closes
reliable_detection.completion: slot8 End of Life object AOT + star_crest inventory (#3 already pays); not pressed live to avoid crest/crow irreversibility on this pass

emuhawk_cleanup: port 7799 free; no lingering EmuHawk from this probe
